# @pondoknusa/testing

Testing utilities for Pondoknusa applications

## Install

```bash
npm install @pondoknusa/testing
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `1.0.3` |
| Source | [`packages/testing`](https://github.com/pondoknusa/pondoknusa/tree/main/packages/testing) |
| Category | Developer experience |
| Node.js | `>=26` |
